pi_items.source: Consistent with task description: 'at ~/IdeaProjects/gs-maven/' where ~ expands to /home/ga/. Also matches export_result.sh line 6 and used in verifier.py line 29.
Verified from official GitHub repository https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spring-attic/gs-maven/main/complete/pom.xml which shows <groupId>org.springframework</groupId>
Verified from official GitHub repository https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spring-attic/gs-maven/main/complete/pom.xml which shows <artifactId>gs-maven</artifactId>
GitHub repository confirmed to exist and be accessible (HTTP 200). This is the official Spring Guide project for Maven.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Maven project based on the real Spring Guide gs-maven project (https://github.com/spring-attic/gs-maven). The official project uses groupId 'org.springframework' and artifactId 'gs-maven', with a 'hello' package containing HelloWorld.java and Greeter.java classes. HelloWorld.java imports org.joda.time.LocalTime and instantiates a Greeter object, while Greeter.java contains a sayHello() method returning 'Hello world!'. The project includes the joda-time dependency (version 2.9.2 in the official version). The task expects the project to be created at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/gs-maven/, compile successfully to generate .class files, and produce a valid pom.xml with the specified coordinates and joda-time dependency.
